name: Reputation.com
description:
What Reputation.com Does

Reputation is a platform of scale, with customer experience at the center of all its offerings, it has a reliable Google review management tool as well. Reputation helps you connect with customers and gather feedback at multiple touchpoints.

Source: G2

Key Features

  • Request reviews from customers via email or SMS to boost review volume.
  • Respond to reviews across all major listing sites from a centralized platform.
  • Gain AI-based insights and recommendations to improve your local review strategy.
  • Measure key review metrics with customizable dashboards and reporting.
  • Track review volume, quality, and sentiment at brand, regional, or location levels.
  • Share review metrics through customizable dashboards and automated reports.
  • Respond to customer feedback with templated or AI-generated response messages.
  • Analyze trends in review metrics and sentiment across all business locations.

Benefits of Reputation

  • Streamline the review solicitation process to generate more online reviews.
  • Efficiently manage your reputation by replying to reviews from one place.
  • Leverage AI-driven guidance to optimize your review acquisition tactics.
  • Stay on top of your online reputation with clear visibility into key metrics.
  • Understand review performance holistically or drill down by region/location.
  • Easily distribute reporting on your review program's success.
  • Show customers you value their voice with timely, on-brand responses.
  • Identify strengths and opportunities by monitoring sentiment patterns.

Pricing

Offers custom pricing after quote request

Pros

✅Customizable reports and dashboards

✅Easy to transition and navigate once setup
✅Offers managed services for reviews

Cons

❌Very expensive for managing Google reviews alone

❌Site integrations are limited for review responses
